enableHealthcheckTooltip: Enable or disable healthcheck monitoring for this database
notifyWhenUnavailableTooltip: Send notifications when database becomes unavailable
checkIntervalMinutesTooltip: How often to check database health (in minutes)
attemptsBeforeDownTooltip: Number of failed attempts before marking database as down
storeAttemptsDaysTooltip: How many days to store health check attempt history
